author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Oni no Hanayome' Unveils Additional Staff, Theme Songs, First Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Kureha's Oni no Hanayome (The Ogre's Bride) novel unveiled additional staff, a key visual (pictured), the theme songs, and first promotional video on Sunday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on July 5 at 12:30 a.m. on Tokyo MX, BS11, Gunma TV, and Tochigi TV, followed by CBC TV, Yomiuri TV, and other stations. Staff Art Director, Art Setting: MAI MAI (Boku ga Aishita Subete no Kimi e) Color Design: Akiko Shibata (Code...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Nijusseiki Denki Mokuroku: Eureka Evrika' Unveils Additional Cast, Third Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Hiro Yuuki's Nijusseiki Denki Mokuroku (20th Century Electricity Catalog) light novel unveiled additional cast, a third key visual (pictured), and the third promotional video on Sunday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on July 5 at 11:00 p.m. on Tokyo MX and exclusively worldwide on Netflix, followed by BS11, ABC TV, and TV Aichi. Cast Jinemon Momokawa: Hiroshi Yanaka (Naruto) Naeko Momokawa: Mayumi Asano (Fuguushoku &quot...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Naoki Urasawa to Launch New Manga 'Saigo no Manga Kyoushitsu' in August 2026
Veteran manga creator Naoki Urasawa will begin a new manga titled Saigo no Manga Kyoushitsu (The Final Manga Classroom) in the September issue of Big Comic Original Zoukan on August 12. The announcement was made in the magazine's July issue on Friday. The magazine preview suggests that the new series will touch on themes related to artificial intelligence and creativity. It notes that although modern society has become increasingly convenient, there are values and experiences from earlier...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Tsukumizu to Launch 'Shoujo Shuumatsu Ryokou' Prequel Manga in June 2026
Shinchosha's Kurage Bunch announced that Tsukumizu will begin drawing a prequel to their Shoujo Shuumatsu Ryokou (Girls' Last Tour) manga, titled Kaisou Toshi Tanpenshuu (Collected Fragments of a Layered City), on the website on June 26. Tsukumizu serialized the slice of life adventure manga on the Kurage Bunch website from February 2014 to January 2018. Shinchosha published the sixth and final volume in March 2018. Yen Press licensed the manga in English in 2016 and released the final...
